projects.name: Crypvault
platforms: and anywhere else you can get a web browser
projects.description: An open-sourced digital asset manager which keeps your cryptocurrency safe from thieves with extremely secure biometrics. Runs in your web browser.

projects.name: Umbra
projects.description: A powerful scripting API and artificial neural network application which allows you to deobfuscate and modify internal Roblox engine code, update any read-only values you wish to, and publish your changes on the fly. Above all else, we're a community that stands for free speech and a free Internet for all. Serving ≈{bUsers} premium users and ≈{bDkUsers} developers (and counting).

projects.name: Umbra Cloud
projects.description: The open-source, self-scaling cloud hosting platform that we use to publish user-generated content created on the Umbra development platform. Umbra Cloud's infrastructure is open source and freely available to everyone.

projects.name: Umbra Launchpad
projects.description: The custom Umbra launcher platform which allows it to run undetected, making it impossible to be spotted by other players, in-game moderators, and even Roblox's own administrators. The hub to manage your account and any scripts that you've uploaded using Umbra Cloud, our free cloud hosting platform.

projects.name: Umbra External Purchase API
projects.description: An API which allows you to accept in-script purchases from external payment providers - namely Square, Google Pay (and Apple Pay on macOS) - without leaving the game. Whenever a user wishes to purchase something, a pop-up window is created, requiring minimal effort from the user. This is impossible in vanilla Roblox.

projects.name: Official Roblox Quality Assurance
projects.description: As an official Roblox Developer Modules Quality Assurance provider, I work closely with the Roblox Team, testing internal products to prevent mistakes and defects and avoid problems when shipping final products to the platform. I provide confidence that quality requirements will be fulfilled, and prevent unfinished products from reaching the general playerbase.

projects.name: gba.js.org
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance that I worked on from October 2021 to February 2022. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.
